readme_task_contract.summary: Two-ball gate counterfactual/hypothetical clips; gate and brick are context.

query.prompt: To X extent do you agree with the following statement?
B would go through the gate if A wasn't there.

config_metadata.experimentName: What would have happened? Counterfactuals, hypotheticals, and causal judgements (Exp 3: Hypothetical judgments)
config_metadata.description: Participants watched partial clips paused before the collision, rated agreement with a hypothetical statement, and then watched the corresponding full clip as feedback.
